top_signals.title: Trump arrives in Turkey as NATO is strained by Russian attacks, U.S. impatience
top_signals.summary: Trump frequently vented about NATO members' refusal to heed U.S. calls for help clearing the Strait of Hormuz during its campaign against Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bank of England plans to ease capital rule for UK lenders
top_signals.summary: Officials say move intended to boost lending and support financial markets in a crisis
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Rivian stock falls 18% as company sells 75 million shares to raise capital
top_signals.summary: The capital raise occurred during extended hours trading following Rivian shares increasing 8.1% on Monday after increasing 19.2% last week.

top_signals.title: The GitHub Actions Attack Pattern Your CI Security Scanners Miss
top_signals.summary: ActiveState explains how GitHub Actions attack chains can evade traditional CI security scanners, why passing a scan doesn't guarantee a secure pipeline, and how organizations can better govern their CI/CD workflows. [...]
